use_cases: Display loading states during async operations like data fetching
Indicate progress during form submissions or API calls
Show activity during page transitions or navigation
Provide visual feedback during file uploads or processing
Indicate background tasks running in applications
ai_summary: Intentui Loader is a lightweight, animated loading spinner component featuring stacked bars with smooth SMIL animations. It supports multiple color intents (primary, secondary, success, warning, danger) and sizes (sm through xl), making it suitable for any application needing visual feedback during async operations or data loading states.
